name: Replay Attack Detected
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Replay Attack Detected
SIGMA Description: Detects possible Kerberos Replay Attack on the domain controllers when "KRB_AP_ERR_REPEAT" Kerberos response is sent to the client

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4649 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Replay Attack Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4649 AQL filter query
